Thanks for sending a PR! Please fill in the sections below. Sections you don't
need can be deleted. The headings are read by maintainers when triaging — keep
them.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Internal refactor (no public API change)
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Affected packages

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] `@better-grid/core`
- [ ] `@better-grid/react`
- [ ] `@better-grid/plugins`
- [ ] `@better-grid/pro`
- [ ] `apps/playground`
- [ ] Docs

## Behavior change

<!-- Describe what changed at the public-API level. Skip for pure refactors / docs. -->

## How was this tested?

<!-- Unit tests added, manual repro in /demo/<page>, etc. Be specific. -->

- [ ] Added or updated tests
- [ ] Verified in the playground (`node scripts/playground-build.js dev`)
- [ ] Verified in a downstream consumer

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, attach a before/after screenshot or short video. Delete this section otherwise. -->

## Related issues

<!-- Use "Closes #123" or "Refs #123". Helps GitHub auto-close on merge. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (Prettier, TypeScript strict)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have updated docs (README, AGENTS, migration guides) where the public surface changed
- [ ] My changes generate no new TypeScript or lint errors
- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
